tool.name: ChatGPT
tool.tagline: AI chatbot powered by GPT models with web browsing and plugins

assessment.reasoning: ChatGPT subject to Article 50 transparency obligations. Users must be informed of AI interaction and generated content must be marked.

applicable_obligations.title: Ensure AI Literacy of Staff
applicable_obligations.description: Every company that uses or builds AI must train their staff so they understand AI risks and responsible use. Training must be proportionate to role and risk level.

applicable_obligations.title: Disclose AI Interaction to Users — Chatbot/Assistant
applicable_obligations.description: AI systems interacting directly with persons must inform them they are interacting with AI, unless obvious from context.

applicable_obligations.title: Mark AI-Generated Content — Machine-Readable
applicable_obligations.description: AI-generated synthetic content (text, image, audio, video) must be machine-readably marked as AI-generated.

applicable_obligations.title: Mark AI-Generated Images — C2PA/Watermark
applicable_obligations.description: AI-generated images must include C2PA manifest and/or invisible watermark indicating AI generation.

applicable_obligations.title: Notify Individuals of Emotion Recognition / Biometric Categorization
applicable_obligations.description: Deployers of emotion recognition or biometric categorization systems must inform exposed individuals in advance.

applicable_obligations.title: Label Deep Fakes and AI-Generated Content for Public
applicable_obligations.description: Deployers of deep fake AI or AI-generated text for public interest must label content as AI-generated.

disclosure.text: ChatGPT can make mistakes. Check important info.
disclosure.location: Bottom of chat interface, below input box

opt_out.path: Profile > Settings > Data Controls > Improve the model for everyone

seo.title: ChatGPT — EU AI Act Compliance | Complior
seo.description: ChatGPT by OpenAI: limited risk. 7 obligations. EU AI Act classification, checklist, and compliance guide.
seo.h1: ChatGPT — EU AI Act Compliance Guide
